title: Neural Style Transfer Pipeline
description: A deep learning pipeline that applies artistic styles to photographs using convolutional neural networks. Built with PyTorch and deployed as a REST API.

contentBlocks.body: This project implements a **neural style transfer** system that takes a content image and a style image, then produces a new image that preserves the content but renders it in the artistic style. The model uses a pre-trained VGG-19 network to extract feature representations at multiple layers.

contentBlocks.code:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torchvision import models

class StyleTransferNet(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        vgg = models.vgg19(pretrained=True).features
        self.slices = nn.ModuleList([
            vgg[:4],   # relu1_2
            vgg[4:9],  # relu2_2
            vgg[9:18], # relu3_4
            vgg[18:27] # relu4_4
        ])

    def forward(self, x):
        features = []
        for slice in self.slices:
            x = slice(x)
            features.append(x)
        return features
contentBlocks.caption: Feature extraction using VGG-19 network slices

contentBlocks.body: The pipeline processes images in under 30 seconds on a T4 GPU. The API accepts base64-encoded images and returns the stylized result. Average SSIM score of 0.82 compared to reference implementations.

title: Real-Time Chat Application
description: A scalable real-time chat app with WebSocket support, message persistence, and user authentication. Built with Node.js, Socket.io, and MongoDB.

contentBlocks.body: The system uses a **microservices architecture** with separate services for authentication, messaging, and presence tracking. WebSocket connections are managed via Socket.io with Redis pub/sub for horizontal scaling across multiple server instances.

contentBlocks.caption: Socket.io connection handler with presence tracking

contentBlocks.body:
- **End-to-end encryption** for private messages
- **Typing indicators** with debounced events
- **Message search** with full-text MongoDB indexes
- **File sharing** with presigned S3 URLs
- **Read receipts** with batched acknowledgments

title: Data Pipeline Orchestrator
description: An ETL pipeline orchestration tool that automates data extraction, transformation, and loading workflows. Features DAG-based scheduling and monitoring dashboards.

contentBlocks.body: The orchestrator uses a **directed acyclic graph (DAG)** to define task dependencies. Each node represents an atomic operation — extract, transform, validate, or load — and edges define execution order. The scheduler supports cron-based triggers and event-driven pipelines.

contentBlocks.code:
from airflow import DAG
from airflow.operators.python import PythonOperator
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

default_args = {
    'retries': 3,
    'retry_delay': timedelta(minutes=5),
}

with DAG('daily_etl',
         default_args=default_args,
         schedule_interval='@daily',
         start_date=datetime(2024, 1, 1)) as dag:

    extract = PythonOperator(
        task_id='extract_data',
        python_callable=extract_from_sources
    )

    transform = PythonOperator(
        task_id='transform_data',
        python_callable=apply_transformations
    )

    load = PythonOperator(
        task_id='load_to_warehouse',
        python_callable=load_to_postgres
    )

    extract >> transform >> load
contentBlocks.caption: Airflow DAG definition for the daily ETL pipeline

title: AI Driven Hydrogen Refuelling Infrastructure Placement & Optimization for UK Ports
description: A Machine learning pipeline to identify optimal locations for hydrogen infrastructure at UK maritime ports, aiming to bridge gaps in national planning to achieve Net Zero 2050 decarbonization targets set by parliament.
